channel.title: Causal AI daily picks
channel.description: Top-5 daily picks from new research, engineering posts, and tools across causal inference, causal ML, causal language models, and online experimentation.

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-16
item.description: 1. pymc-labs/CausalPy 0.8.1 — Other · score 55 · pymc-labs/CausalPy releases 2. Lambenthan/empericalwiki — 经管实证研究的 AI 知识库 — 从文献阅读到 Stata 执行，一条流水线串到底。基于 Karpathy 的 LLM-Wiki 理念，按实证研究 10 类实体（变量 / 数据集 / 模型 / 机制 /… — Causal LMs · score 34 · GitHub topic:econometrics 3. antonbarr-data/dqt — A Data Quality Tool that tells you what and surfaces the why — Other · score 30 · GitHub topic:causal-inference

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-15
item.description: 1. A Practical Guide to Instrumental Variables Methods with Heterogeneous Treatment Effects — Causal Inference · score 60 · arXiv stat.ME · Tymon Słoczyński, Liyang Sun, S. Derya Uysal 2. Generalizing conditional average treatment effects from nested randomized trials to all trial-eligible individuals — Uplift / HTE · score 60 · arXiv stat.ME · Lan Wen, Issa J. Dahabreh, Yu-Han Chiu 3. In-Context Learning for Data-Driven Censored Inventory Control — Causal LMs · score 56 · arXiv stat.ML · Sohom Mukherjee, Anh-Duy Pham, Richard Pibernik, Yunbei Xu 4. Monetary Policy in the Media Spotlight: Sentiments, Signals, and Economic Impact — Causal LMs · score 56 · arXiv econ.EM · Firmin Ayivodji, Etienne Briand, Kevin Moran, Dalibor Stevanovic 5. MeMo: Memory as a Model — Causal LMs · score 56 · arXiv cs.LG · Ryan Wei Heng Quek, Sanghyuk Lee, Alfred Wei Lun Leong, Arun Verma et al. (9 authors)

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-11
item.description: 1. Real vs. Semi-Simulated: Rethinking Evaluation for Treatment Effect Estimation — Uplift / HTE · score 68 · arXiv stat.ML · George Panagopoulos 2. What should post-training optimize? A test-time scaling law perspective — Causal LMs · score 60 · arXiv stat.ML · Muheng Li, Jian Qian, Wenlong Mou 3. When Can Digital Personas Reliably Approximate Human Survey Findings? — Causal LMs · score 60 · arXiv stat.ML · Mumin Jia, Yilin Chen, Divya Sharma, Jairo Diaz-Rodriguez 4. Extended Wasserstein-GAN Approach to Causal Distribution Learning: Density-Free Estimation and Minimax Optimality — Causal Inference · score 60 · arXiv stat.ML · Shu Tamano, Masaaki Imaizumi 5. Sample size and power calculations for causal inference with time-to-event outcomes — Causal Inference · score 60 · arXiv stat.ME · Chengxin Yang, Bo Liu, Fan Li
